options.name: -bump
options.description: delete bump connect target constraint on specified bump

options.name: -instName
options.description: the instName to change in bump connect target constraint

options.name: -pinName
options.description: the pin name to change in bump connect target constraint

options.name: -portNum
options.description: the port number to change in bump connect target constraint

options.name: -selected
options.description: delete bump connect target constraint on selected bumps

options.name: -toInstName
options.description: the instName to change to in bump connect target constraint

options.name: -toPinName
options.description: the pin name to change to in bump connect target constraint

options.name: -toPortNum
options.description: the port number to change to in bump connect target constraint
